instance.reset-password-mail:
email -> applicationName -> code -> { emailBody = {{{

Dear Recipient,

A request has been made to reset the password for your {$applicationName} account.

If you made this request, you can set a new password using the following code.
Verficationcode: {$code}

For security reasons, this code is only valid for a limited time and can be used once.

If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.

For your security, we recommend using a strong and unique password and updating it regularly.

If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact our support team.

Kind regards,
Your {$applicationName} Team

}}}; subject = "Password Reset Request in " + $applicationName; try( sendMail( subject: $subject, to: $email, body: $emailBody ), catch: mailError -> { info("Sending mail to " + $email + " failed. reason: " + $mailError); false } ); }
